summary: Tested new features: Client Onboarding wizard (6-step: Welcome → Profile → Risk Assessment → Goals → Review → Complete) and AI Copilot (chat interface with command processing, quick actions, results panel). Both features working correctly. Navigation has 'GET STARTED' section with Client Onboarding and AI Advisor, plus AI Copilot with 'New' badge in Overview section.
passed_tests: Client Onboarding page (/onboarding) loads with data-testid='client-onboarding-page'
Onboarding Welcome step shows 'Welcome to Your Financial Journey' title
Onboarding Welcome step shows 3 preview cards: Risk Assessment (4 quick questions), Set Goals (Short & long term), Get Your SOA (Personalized advice)
Onboarding Welcome step has 'Let's Get Started' button
Onboarding Profile step shows 'Tell Us About Yourself' title
Onboarding Profile step has all form fields: First Name, Last Name, Email, Phone, Age, Spouse/Partner, Dependents, Occupation
Onboarding Risk Assessment step shows 'Risk Assessment' title with 'Help us understand your investment preferences'
Onboarding Risk Assessment has 4 questions: Investment timeframe, Reaction to 20% drop, Primary investment goal, Lifestyle maintenance without income
Onboarding Risk Assessment calculates risk profile after answering all questions
Onboarding Risk Assessment shows 'Your Risk Profile' with profile name (Balanced), score, expected return, allocation percentages
Onboarding Risk Assessment shows pie chart for recommended allocation
Onboarding Goals step shows 'Your Financial Goals' title
Onboarding Goals step has Primary Financial Goal dropdown with options: Comfortable Retirement, Build Wealth, Generate Income, Children's Education, Buy Property, Pay Off Debt, Start/Grow Business
Onboarding Goals step has Target Retirement Age and Target Retirement Income fields
Onboarding Goals step has 'Add Specific Goals' section with description, amount, timeframe inputs
Onboarding Goals step shows Short-Term Goals (1-3 years) and Long-Term Goals (5+ years) lists
Onboarding Goals step has Financial Snapshot section with Estimated Assets, Liabilities, Annual Income, Net Worth
Onboarding Review step shows 'Review Your Information' title
Onboarding Review step shows Profile summary (Name, Age, Spouse, Dependents)
Onboarding Review step shows Risk Profile summary with allocation percentages and expected return
Onboarding Review step shows Goals summary (Primary Goal, Retirement Age, Target Income, Goals count)
Onboarding Review step shows Financial Snapshot (Assets, Liabilities, Net Worth)
Onboarding Review step has 'Download Quick SOA' and 'Open Full SOA Builder' buttons
Onboarding Review step has 'Complete Onboarding' button
Onboarding Complete step shows 'You're All Set!' title
Onboarding Complete step has 'Go to Dashboard' and 'Talk to Copilot' buttons
Onboarding saves data to localStorage on completion
Copilot page (/copilot) loads with data-testid='copilot-page'
Copilot shows 'Financial Copilot' title with 'Demo Mode' badge
Copilot shows 'Chat with Copilot' section with initial bot message
Copilot has Quick Actions panel with 6 actions: Calculate my tax, Run stock sell scenario, Show cashflow, Check risk profile, Generate BAS, Property analysis
Copilot has 'Try Asking' section with example prompts
Copilot has input field with placeholder 'Ask me anything...'
Copilot processes 'Calculate my tax' command and shows tax calculation result
Copilot tax result shows income, estimated tax, effective rate, and 'View Tax Analysis' action button
Copilot processes 'What if I sell all my stocks?' command and shows scenario result
Copilot scenario result shows Total Value, Cost Base, Capital Gain, CGT (50% discount), Net Proceeds
Copilot scenario result has 'Run Detailed Scenario' action button
Copilot processes 'Show my monthly cashflow' command and shows cashflow result
Copilot cashflow result shows Income, Expenses, Surplus, and 'View Budget Details' action button
Copilot cashflow result panel shows 12-month projection chart
Copilot processes 'What's my risk profile?' command and shows risk profile response
Copilot risk profile response has 'Open Risk Profiler' action button
Navigation sidebar has 'GET STARTED' section
Navigation has 'Client Onboarding' link in GET STARTED section
Navigation has 'AI Advisor' link in GET STARTED section
Navigation has 'AI Copilot' link with 'New' badge in OVERVIEW section
Navigation links have correct data-testid attributes (nav-onboarding, nav-copilot, nav-financial-advisor)
Navigation to /onboarding works correctly
Navigation to /copilot works correctly
Compliance modal appears on first load and can be dismissed by checking checkbox and clicking 'I Understand & Accept'
critical_code_review_comments: ClientOnboarding.jsx implements 6-step wizard with proper state management and localStorage persistence
ClientOnboarding.jsx has 4-question risk assessment with profile calculation (Conservative, Balanced, Growth, Aggressive)
ClientOnboarding.jsx generates Quick SOA text file download
Copilot.jsx implements AI chat interface with intent detection using keyword patterns
Copilot.jsx supports 15 intent categories: bas, tax, scenario, cashflow, risk, stocks, property, super, cgt, loan, soa, navigate, calculate, report, help
Copilot.jsx has results panel showing charts and calculations based on command type
Copilot.jsx is clearly marked as 'Demo Mode' - no real AI/API calls
Layout.jsx navigation has proper structure with GET STARTED section and AI Copilot with New badge
All new pages have proper data-testid attributes for testing
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - uses localStorage and mock data defined in components
context_for_next_testing_agent: Tested new features: 1) ClientOnboarding at /onboarding - 6-step wizard (Welcome → Profile → Risk Assessment → Goals → Review → Complete) with 4-question risk assessment calculating Conservative/Balanced/Growth/Aggressive profiles, goal management with short/long term goals, financial snapshot, Quick SOA download, and localStorage persistence. 2) Copilot at /copilot - AI chat interface (Demo Mode) with intent detection for 15 command categories, Quick Actions panel (6 actions), results panel showing charts/calculations, action buttons for navigation. Navigation sidebar has 'GET STARTED' section with Client Onboarding and AI Advisor, plus AI Copilot with 'New' badge in Overview section. Compliance modal requires checkbox + 'I Understand & Accept' button to dismiss.

mocked_apis.Client Onboarding: Frontend-only - no API, uses localStorage for saved data
mocked_apis.Copilot: DEMO MODE - frontend-only intent detection and calculations, no real AI/API calls
